display.purpose: Page titles and hero data. Once per screen.

headline.purpose: Section headings, modal titles, day headers.

title.purpose: Card titles, button labels, component headings.

label.purpose: Tab labels, badges, metadata, small stats.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Full-width on mobile, inline on wider views.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 16px; background: #5B7FFF; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 14px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Use alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 16px; background: rgba(44,44,46,0.06); color: #5B7FFF; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 14px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 16px; background: #D4685A; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 14px; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.96); }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard content card with shadow and rounded corners.
components.html: Card content here
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 8px 24px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px; }

components.name: Bottom Sheet Modal
components.description: iOS-style bottom sheet modal with slide-up animation.
components.html:
Título

Modal content
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); animation: ds-fade-in 0.2s ease-out; } @keyframes ds-fade-in { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } .ds-modal-sheet { width: 100%; max-width: 448px; background: #fff; border-radius: 28px 28px 0 0; padding: 20px; padding-bottom: max(20px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); max-height: 90%; overflow-y: auto; animation: ds-slide-up 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); } @keyframes ds-slide-up { from { transform: translateY(100%); } to { transform: translateY(0); } } .ds-modal-handle { width: 36px; height: 6px; background: rgba(44,44,46,0.06); border-radius: 9999px; margin: 0 auto 16px; } .ds-modal-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-modal-title { font-family: Nunito, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: clamp(1.125rem, 3.5vw, 1.375rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #2C2C2E; margin: 0; } .ds-modal-close { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(44,44,46,0.06); color: #9A9892; border: none; font-size: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Navigation Tab
components.html: HojeRoteiro
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(44,44,46,0.1); padding: 0 4px 4px; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 10px 0 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #9A9892; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .ds-tab-active { color: #5B7FFF; }

components.name: Badge / Chip
components.description: Semantic status badge with tinted background.
components.html: AltaConfirmadoNormal
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge-danger { background: rgba(212,104,90,0.15); color: #D4685A; } .ds-badge-success { background: rgba(107,163,104,0.15); color: #6BA368; } .ds-badge-neutral { background: rgba(44,44,46,0.06); color: #9A9892; }

components.name: Skeleton Loading
components.css: .ds-skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(44,44,46,0.06) 25%, rgba(44,44,46,0.1) 50%, rgba(44,44,46,0.06) 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; border-radius: 12px; animation: ds-shimmer 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-shimmer { 0% { background-position: 200% 0; } 100% { background-position: -200% 0; } }

narrative.overview: A travel planning companion that feels like a beautifully kept journal — warm, precise, and personal. Every screen is designed for a thumb and a moment: glancing at today's agenda on a train platform, logging a receipt outside a museum, checking the next city's accommodation while walking to the hotel. The aesthetic is Scandinavian editorial: generous whitespace, structured grids, warm natural tones, and iOS-inspired sheet interactions that feel tactile without being heavy. This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS corporate design, over-decorated travel apps with loud colors and playful illustrations, and the AI-generated template look. Every element earns its place through utility, not decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Warm minimalism — natural linen backgrounds, soft charcoal ink, intentional whitespace
Mobile-first PWA — designed for thumb-zone access, single-hand use, and interrupted sessions
iOS-native feel — layered sheets, spring animations, blurred backdrops, responsive haptic-scale taps
Editorial typography — Nunito for warm display moments, Inter for precise body reading
Color as signal — the palette is restrained by default; accent colors carry semantic meaning

rules.name: The Restrained Palette Rule
rules.body: Chroma is concentrated in the semantic accent set. Neutrals carry the interface; color does the signaling, not the decorating. If a screen has more than two accent colors visible, it's wrong.

rules.name: The One Font Per Role Rule
rules.body: Nunito never appears as body text below 1rem. Inter never appears as a display heading above 1.5rem unless as a fallback glyph. The pairing is a deliberate contrast, not an accidental overlap.

rules.name: The Flat Base Rule
rules.body: Root surfaces (body background, grouped sections) have no shadow. Shadows only appear on interactive or stacked elements (cards, modals, sheets). The ground is always flat.

dos: Do use generous whitespace — Scandinavian editorial breathing room is the default. Let content breathe.
Do keep the palette restrained. Neutral backgrounds carry the interface; accent colors are semantic signals, not decoration.
Do use Nunito for display moments (headings, titles) and Inter for everything else. The pairing must be deliberate.
Do use bottom sheets for all modal interactions — it's the primary interaction pattern.
Do use `tap-scale` on all tappable elements for haptic-like press feedback.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast: body text (#2C2C2E) on Warm Linen (#F6F4F0) = 12.4:1.
Do prefer list layouts over card grids for content-heavy pages.
donts: Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or sketchy SVG illustrations.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't put Nunito in body text below 1rem.
Don't pair `border: 1px solid X` with `box-shadow` at 16px+ blur on the same element.
Don't over-round. Cards at 20px is the maximum. Pill shape is for badges only.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow labels above every section.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use hero-metric templates (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't use repeating-linear-gradient diagonal stripe backgrounds.
